Snack time = family bonding time. Make it special with our healthy and affordable tomato ketchup. 🥰 #FamilyMeals
Who said healthy can't be tasty? Add a dollop of our tomato ketchup to your snacks and taste the difference! 🍅👌 #HealthySnacks

Your kids will love it, and so will your wallet. Healthy tomato ketchup at just ₹10. ❤️🍅 #HealthyEating
reel_ideas: Show a mom prepping fun, healthy snacks for her kids using tomato ketchup, ending with happy kids enjoying the snacks. Add upbeat music and text overlays like 'Healthy Snacks Made Easy!'
Create a '90s nostalgia' reel showing how tomato ketchup transforms simple snacks into something special, tying into the trend of childhood memories.
ASMR-style reel of pouring ketchup, crunching snacks, and happy munching sounds to highlight the sensory appeal of the product.
Funny reel with siblings competing to create the best snack using tomato ketchup, leveraging the 'Sister VS Sister' trend.
A quick '3 Snacks in 30 Seconds' reel showcasing easy recipes with tomato ketchup, emphasizing affordability and health.
